titleStmt.title: SII 16.21: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 21. (A.R. No. 345 of 1905.) DĒVIGUḌI, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a pillar set up in the courtyard of the Taḷakaṇṭamma temple.
This is dated Śaka 1328, Vyaya, Mārgaśira śu. 15, Thursday, lunar eclipse. The date corresponds to 1406 A.D., November 25.

It records a grant of half the extent of fields of the village Dānavulapāḍu to the temple of Taḷakaṇṭidēvi by the king, on the representation made by the secular priests (taṁbaḷḷu) of the temple on the occasion of the king's coronation at Vijayanagara, when the king, having given his assent to the grant, ordered Nāgappa-daṇḍanāyaka to execute it.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svastiśrī śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1328
Agunēṁṭiki vyayasaṁvvatsara mā
rggasira śu 15 gu . yī tithini sōma
grahaṇakālamappuḍu svasti
śrīma(ṁ)nmahāmaṁḍalēsvara rā
jādhirāja rājaparamēsvara hari
hararāyani kumāruṁḍu sva
sti śrīma(ṁ)nma(ma)hāmaṁḍalēsvara
śrīvīrapratāva dēvarāyamahā
rāyalu vijayānagarānama pa
ṭṭābhiṣiktuṁḍai sōmagrahaṇakāla
mappuḍu taḷakaṁṭṭidēvikini dāna
vulapāṭi polaṁlōpalanu sagamu
polamu vālugu sāsanāla naḍu
māṁnnu Aṁgaraṁgavaibhōgānaku
[nnu A]mritapaḍikiṁnni sōmagraha
ṇakālamappuḍu ta(ṁ)ḷakaṁṭidē
vi ta(ṁ)mmaḍlu vacci vi(ṁ)nnapaṁ sēstē

nu dhārāpūrvva
mugānu dhā
ravōsi yī dha
rmmaṁ yiṭlē celli
ṁcumani nāgappa
daṁṇṇāyaṁku
laku rāyasā
luveṭṭi Anipitē
nu Ā taḷakaṁṭi
dēvikini dhāravō
sina dha(ṁ)rmaṁ rāya
niki pu(ṁ)ṇyaṁgānu
Aṭṭi Aṁgaraṁgavai
bhōgānakuṁnnu A
mritapaḍikiṁnni Aṭṭi
dhārāpūrvvaṁmai
Ācaṁdrārkastāyi
gānu celliṁcciri .
svada ttaṁ parada
ttaṁ vā yō harē
ti vasuṁdharāṁ .
ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣa saha
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
maṁgaḷamahāśrī
śrīśrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.21 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
